title: salvia verbenaca var. clandestina
intro: Salvia verbenaca var. clandestina, also known as clandestine wood sage, is a lesser-known variety of the Salvia verbenaca plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family of herbs. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Salvia verbenaca var. clandestina include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
